clues.clue: This small, fast planet orbits closest to the Sun.
This iron-oxide-covered world is nicknamed the 'Red Planet.'
This largest gas giant sports a centuries-old Great Red Spot storm.
This gas giant is famous for its broad, icy ring system.
This distant body was demoted to 'dwarf planet' status in 2006.
This big blue, wish-granting spirit bursts from a lamp in 'Aladdin.'
This carrot-nosed snowman from 'Frozen' dreams of summer and warm hugs.
A meerkat and a warthog teach 'Hakuna Matata' in 'The Lion King'; name the warthog.
This goat-legged trainer of heroes in 'Hercules' was voiced by Danny DeVito.
This uptight mantel-clock majordomo keeps order in the Beast's castle.
This enthusiastic orange-striped feline insists Frosted Flakes are 'gr-r-reat!'
This green-suited Irish sprite guards the marshmallows in a General Mills charm cereal.
This frantic bird goes 'cuckoo' for a chocolate-puff cereal.
This nautical officer in a tricorn hat sells a crunchy sweetened-corn cereal.
An eternally denied rabbit is told this fruity cereal is 'for kids' only.
Scarlett O'Hara ends 'Gone with the Wind' vowing that 'after all, tomorrow is' this.
'Casablanca' closes calling this the start of 'a beautiful' bond between two men.
An aged Rose drops this priceless blue gem into the sea at the close of 'Titanic.'
clues.response: What is the Heart of the Ocean?

clues.clue: The 1968 'Planet of the Apes' ends with Taylor finding this toppled New York monument on a beach.
clues.response: What is the Statue of Liberty?

clues.clue: The reprogrammed cyborg gives a thumbs-up sinking into molten steel in this 1991 sequel.
'The Sixth Sense' reveals Bruce Willis's character has been in this state the whole film.
'Fight Club' twists when the narrator realizes he and Tyler Durden share this trait.
clues.response: What is being the same person?

clues.clue: 'Soylent Green' ends with the horrifying revelation that the food is made from these.
'The Empire Strikes Back' stuns with the reveal that Vader is this relation to Luke.
'The Usual Suspects' unveils that meek Verbal Kint is really this criminal mastermind.

final.clue: This late, beloved comedian improvised the manic Genie in Disney's 1992 'Aladdin.'
